items.title: ⚠️ Low Sleep Recovery
items.sub: Yesterday's sleep was poor. Consider lighter training today, extra caffeine AM only, 20 min nap at 1 PM if possible.

items.title: 🧘 High Stress Alert
items.sub: Stress was elevated yesterday. Prioritize breathwork, skip HIIT finisher, add 5 min meditation before training.

items.title: 💪 Recovery Check
items.sub: High soreness reported. Foam roll 10 min pre-workout. Prioritize warm-up. Drop weight 10% if form breaks.

items.title: 🔥 Peak Day
items.sub: Energy and sleep both high. Push hard today — add weight or reps to compound lifts.

items.title: 🙏 Gratitude
items.sub: 3 things you're grateful for. Sets intention before the day.

items.title: 🌬️ Breathwork
items.sub: Box breathing: 4 in, 4 hold, 4 out, 4 hold × 4 rounds. Primes nervous system.

items.title: ⚖️ Weight
items.sub: 📈 179.5 lbs (↑0.2 since last) — water/food weight fluctuation is normal

items.title: Hydration Protocol
items.sub: 22oz water + pinch sea salt + lemon. Daily target: 108oz

items.title: Sunlight Exposure
items.sub: 10-15 min outdoor light, no sunglasses. Sets circadian clock for better sleep tonight.

items.title: Morning Supplements
items.sub: Vitamin D3 (5000 IU) + K2, Creatine (5g), Omega-3 (2g), L-Carnitine (2g), Ashwagandha (600mg)

items.title: ⚠️ Weight Trending Up
items.sub: Up 0.9lbs this week vs goal of losing. Tighten portions today. Extra 15 min cardio.

items.title: Brunch
items.sub: Veggie omelet: 3 eggs, mushrooms, peppers, onions, feta, side of fruit · 418 cal · 31P/18C/22F — Running: 418/2500 cal · 📍 prep ahead

items.title: 🎯 Deep Work Block 1
items.sub: High-leverage tasks. Phone off. No email. 90-min sprint.

items.title: ⚡ Focus Block
items.sub: 90 min deep work. Phone off. Single task. Peak cognitive window.

items.title: ☕ Break + Movement
items.sub: Walk, stretch, clear your head. 15 min.

items.title: 📞 Admin Block
items.sub: Calls, emails, meetings, ops. Batch process everything.

items.title: 📖 Reading Block
items.sub: 30 min non-fiction. Invest in your knowledge base.

items.title: 🎯 Deep Work Block 2
items.sub: Revenue-generating work. Sales, building, creating.

items.title: Lunch
items.sub: Turkey burger (no bun), side salad, sweet potato wedges · 462 cal · 42P/30C/16F — Running: 880/2500 cal · 📍 prep ahead

items.title: ⚡ Sprint Block
items.sub: Quick wins, follow-ups, outreach. Clear the queue.

items.title: 🧠 Strategy Hour
items.sub: Planning, learning, big picture thinking. Review metrics.

items.title: Hydration Check
items.sub: 65oz+ by now (of 108oz daily). Keep water at desk. Add electrolytes if training later.

items.title: Snack
items.sub: Protein shake + mixed berries · 220 cal · 33P/15C/2F — Running: 1100/2500 cal · 📍 prep ahead

items.title: 💼 Work Complete
items.sub: Shut the laptop. Hard boundary. Protect your evening protocol.

items.title: Dinner
items.sub: Grilled chicken (5oz), roasted Mediterranean veggies, tahini drizzle · 440 cal · 44P/20C/16F — Running: 1540/2500 cal

items.title: Evening Supplements
items.sub: Magnesium Glycinate (400mg), ZMA, Ashwagandha (600mg), Melatonin (0.5mg if needed)

items.title: 📝 Evening Journal
items.sub: What went well? What to improve? Capture insights before sleep.

items.title: Wind Down
items.sub: Blue light glasses on. Dim lights to 30%. 10 min reading or breathwork. Room temp to 65-68°F.

items.title: Lights Out
items.sub: 7.5-8.5 hours sleep for recovery & GH release. Phone on airplane mode. Blackout curtains.

label: money only / Thursday / recovery intensity / 5-24 full wallet / business partner

blocks.name: Morning Protocol
blocks.synergy: Hydration → Sunlight → Peptides. Your circadian reset sequence.

blocks.name: Deep Work
blocks.synergy: Front-load hard decisions. Willpower depletes throughout the day.

blocks.name: Midday Protocol
blocks.synergy: Cortisol dips after lunch. Protein prevents the crash. Movement resets your focus for the afternoon.

blocks.name: Training Protocol
blocks.synergy: Peak body temperature = peak strength. Afternoon is optimal for hypertrophy.

blocks.name: Wind-Down Protocol
blocks.synergy: Every minute of deep sleep = recovery + GH release. Protect this window.
